disclaimer.notAffiliated: FastBooker is NOT affiliated with Affluences.
disclaimer.beforeUsing: Before using this application, please understand:
disclaimer.unofficialTool: This is an unofficial tool that may violate Affluences' Terms of Service
disclaimer.accountBanned: Your Affluences account could be suspended or banned
disclaimer.stopWorking: This service may stop working at any time
disclaimer.ownRisk: You use this tool at your own risk
disclaimer.noWarranty: No warranty or guarantee is provided
disclaimer.educationalOnly: This is for educational and personal use only
disclaimer.educationalPurpose: This project was created for educational purposes. By continuing, you accept full responsibility for any consequences.

disclaimerPage.title: ⚠️ Legal Disclaimer
disclaimerPage.notAffiliatedBold: FastBooker is an independent, unofficial project and is NOT affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to Affluences in any way.
disclaimerPage.notAffiliatedDesc: This application was created through reverse-engineering of the Affluences API for educational purposes and to demonstrate improved user experience design.
disclaimerPage.useAtOwnRiskDesc: By using FastBooker, you acknowledge and accept the following risks:
disclaimerPage.tosViolation: Terms of Service Violations: Using this tool likely violates Affluences' Terms of Service
disclaimerPage.accountSuspension: Account Suspension: Your Affluences account may be suspended or permanently banned
disclaimerPage.serviceInterruption: Service Interruption: This service may stop working at any time if Affluences changes their API
disclaimerPage.noWarrantyItem: No Warranty: This software is provided "AS IS" without warranty of any kind
disclaimerPage.legalConsequences: Legal Consequences: Unauthorized API access may have legal implications in some jurisdictions
disclaimerPage.resp1: You will use this tool responsibly and ethically
disclaimerPage.resp2: You will not abuse the service with excessive requests
disclaimerPage.resp3: You will comply with your university's policies and applicable laws
disclaimerPage.resp4: You accept full responsibility for any consequences resulting from use
disclaimerPage.resp5: You understand this is for personal, non-commercial use only
disclaimerPage.eduNotIntended: This project is NOT intended for:
disclaimerPage.ethicalDesc: If you choose to use FastBooker:
disclaimerPage.ethical3: Don't use automated booking to unfairly monopolize resources
disclaimerPage.ethical4: Consider the impact on other students
disclaimerPage.ethical5: Support the official Affluences app when possible
disclaimerPage.contactAffluences: For Affluences Representatives: If you have concerns about this project, please contact the repository owner through {link}. We will respond promptly and cooperatively.
disclaimerPage.contactUsers: For Users: If you have questions or concerns, please open an issue on GitHub.
disclaimerPage.noWarrantyText: THE SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED "AS IS", WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO THE WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE AND NONINFRINGEMENT. IN NO EVENT SHALL THE AUTHORS OR COPYRIGHT HOLDERS BE LIABLE FOR ANY CLAIM, DAMAGES OR OTHER LIABILITY, WHETHER IN AN ACTION OF CONTRACT, TORT OR OTHERWISE, ARISING FROM, OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THE SOFTWARE OR THE USE OR OTHER DEALINGS IN THE SOFTWARE.
